name: grok-build-gui
description: Grok Build - XAI for VS Code — the professional AI agent interface powered by xAI Grok. Plan, build, and ship with autonomous agent workflows, precise edit approvals, rich context, model selection, voice input, and inline generative media over the Agent Client Protocol.

commands.title: Grok: Debug — Show dummy plan card (for testing Approve/Reject/Cancel)

grok.cliPath.description: Path to the grok binary. Empty = auto-discover (~/.grok/bin/grok, then PATH).

grok.defaultModel.description: Model ID to use on new sessions. Empty = CLI default.

grok.includeActiveFileByDefault.description: Auto-add the active editor file as a context chip.

enumDescriptions: CLI default (no flag passed to grok agent stdio)
grok.defaultEffort.description: Reasoning effort passed as --reasoning-effort to grok agent stdio. Values match the grok CLI's accepted set (none, minimal, low, medium, high, xhigh). Changing this restarts the session.

grok.useCtrlEnterToSend.description: Use Ctrl/Cmd+Enter to send (Enter inserts newline).

grok.autoOpenSecondarySidebar.description: Automatically open Grok in the secondary sidebar (right panel) when VS Code starts.

grok.autoUpdateCliOnUpgrade.description: Silently run grok update when the extension version changes. Disabled by default to avoid slow startups.

grok.voiceApiKey.markdownDescription: xAI API key for voice input (Speech-to-Text via `api.x.ai/v1/stt`). This is a **separate** developer key from [console.x.ai](https://console.x.ai) — it is billed pay-as-you-go and is unrelated to the Grok CLI login. Leave empty to fall back to `GROK_VOICE_API_KEY` or `XAI_API_KEY` in your workspace `.env`.

grok.ffmpegPath.description: Path to the ffmpeg binary used to record the microphone for voice input. Empty = use 'ffmpeg' from PATH. Install ffmpeg from https://ffmpeg.org if voice input reports it as missing.

grok.voiceInputDevice.description: Microphone device for voice input. Empty = system default (on Windows, the first DirectShow audio device is auto-detected). Set this to a specific device name (Windows/dshow) or index (macOS/avfoundation) to override.

grok.voiceSendPhrase.description: Spoken phrase that auto-submits the message when it ends a voice transcription (e.g. say "…fix the bug, grok send"). The phrase is stripped before sending. Leave empty to disable hands-free sending.

grok.voiceStreaming.description: Stream voice transcription live as you speak (words appear in the composer in real time, and "grok send" can submit without a second click). Disable to use one-shot batch mode (click to start, click to stop, then transcribe). Streaming costs $0.20/hr of audio vs $0.10/hr batch.

scripts.prepackage: node -e "for (const f of require('fs').readdirSync('.')) if (f.endsWith('.vsix')) require('fs').unlinkSync(f)"
